seoTitle: How to Transfer Sweatcoin Money to PayPal (2026)
metaDescription: See how to redeem Sweatcoin rewards for real PayPal cash using the app's Influencer Hub payout vouchers and verification form.
intro: Sweatcoin points can't be sent to PayPal with a simple transfer button, but the app's referral and marketplace rewards system lets you redeem real cash payouts. This guide covers checking your invite count, claiming an eligible voucher, and submitting your PayPal email for payout. It's aimed at Sweatcoin users looking to cash out their activity rewards.

steps.heading: Check your referral count
steps.body: Open the Sweatcoin app, go to your profile hub, and verify your total invitation count and eligibility status.

steps.heading: Open the Influencer Hub
steps.body: Scroll to the Influencer Hub section to review available PayPal cash payout tiers based on your activity.

steps.heading: Select an eligible payout offer
steps.body: Choose a highlighted offer you qualify for, ranging from small denominations up to larger commercial tiers.

steps.heading: Generate and copy your voucher code
steps.body: Accept the terms to generate a unique payout code, then tap through to the linked verification form.

steps.heading: Submit your PayPal email
steps.body: Paste your voucher code and enter your active PayPal account email to route the payment for review.

faq.question: How long does the payout take to arrive?
faq.answer: Processing time varies, but you should monitor your PayPal activity feed after submitting your verification form.

faq.question: What if my Sweatcoin and PayPal emails don't match?
faq.answer: Make sure the email you submit on the verification form is the exact one tied to your active PayPal account to avoid delays.

faq.question: Can I redeem multiple payout tiers at once?
faq.answer: Eligibility depends on your accumulated invites and activity, so check the app for which tiers are currently unlocked for you.

faq.question: Are international payouts supported?
faq.answer: Setting up your PayPal wallet currency correctly can help avoid holds when receiving international cash deposits.
